# llms.txt - Hiring Manager Summary (Machine-Readable)

author: Dave Eichler
contact: linkedin.com/in/daaaave-atx

# JD Alignment
jd_criteria_met:
  - multi_tier_12_factor: verified against actual files
  - clean_architectural_separation: view/api/service/persistence/database
  - ai_agent_orchestration: hive system with human oversight
  - ai_output_correction: PROCESS-13 (paused for DDD testing)
  - cicd_pipelines: Railway + Vercel auto-deploy
  - strangler_fig: 2003 Java/PHP → 2026 Python/TypeScript

# Platform Philosophy
philosophy: "Simulate before you ship. Stop playing what-if with your customers."

# Three Currencies
tracking:
  - CLOCK: wall time (active)
  - COIN: USD cost (active)
  - CARBON: tokens as proxy with model-specific rates from carbon.yml

# Carbon Note
carbon_tracking_note: >
  Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google do not currently publish
  per-model carbon footprint data. Tokens tracked as proxy.

# DES
des_status: proprietary IP, philosophy documented, implementation not shown

# PROCESS-13
process_13_status: >
  Implemented in hivenode/scheduler/integrity_check.py (523 lines).
  Currently paused while testing DDD (Design-Driven Development) approach.
  DDD front-loads design decisions before implementation.

# Factory Daemons
factory_management: _tools/restart-services.sh (nohup with smart restart)
daemons:
  - scheduler
  - dispatcher
  - queue_runner
  - triage_daemon
  - vite
  - hivenode

# History
origin: 2003 Java/PHP/MySQL call center platform (Processing applets)
original_file_count: 4,366 files (2007 snapshot)
original_db_tables: 52 application tables
evolution: 20+ years of domain refinement
current: Python/TypeScript/PostgreSQL with AI orchestration
